hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq -e '(^|[[:space:]])(pnpm|npm|yarn|bun)([[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]+)*[[:space:]]+add([[:space:]]+-[^[:space:]]+)*[[:space:]]+[a-zA-Z0-9@]' -e '(^|[[:space:]])(pnpm|npm|yarn)([[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]+)*[[:space:]]+(install|i)([[:space:]]+-[^[:space:]]+)*[[:space:]]+[a-zA-Z0-9@]' -e '(^|[[:space:]])(pnpm[[:space:]]+dlx|npx|bunx)[[:space:]]+(-[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*[a-zA-Z0-9@]' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Supply-chain check (CLAUDE.md): before adding/installing or dlx/npx-running this package, web-search the exact package + version for malware, supply-chain compromise, typosquatting, and known-bad versions; verify publisher, source repo, and release age; pin exact @mastra/* versions; after install run: grep -c easy-day-js pnpm-lock.yaml (must print 0). Approve only once verified safe."}}' || true
